'''Quaffug the Hutt''' was a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] on [[Tertiary Moon of Blimph|Blimph 3]], the self-styled [[Overboss]] of [[Tertiary Moon of Blimph|Blimph]]. Quaffug lost his [[Ceramo-Werx]] manufacturing facility to [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] in a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]], which resulted in the ruin of his criminal empire. In order to save his crime organization, the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] had to resort to [[Slavery/Legends|slave labor]], forcing the [[Jokhalli]] to work for him. Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], desperate for resources, sent Calrissian to negotiate a treaty with the Hutt.

It was rumored that Quaffug had multiple [[Brain/Legends|brains]].

He owned a [[Yacht/Legends|staryacht]] named ''[[Lorda Doma Toma]]''.
